simple_types.name: Fixed
Unsigned_32
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_32 is mod 2 ** Integer'Size
  with Size => Integer'Size;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_64
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_64 is mod 2 ** (Unsigned_32'Size * 2)
  with Size => Unsigned_32'Size * 2;

array_types.name: Unsigned_32_Array
array_types.code:
type Unsigned_32_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Unsigned_32
  with Convention => C;

record_types.name: Optional_Result

subtypes.name: Unused_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Unused_Type is Boolean range False .. False;
